subcodes.title: Words to Julia Grundy spoken around Jan. 1905
subcodes.first_line: May we all live in the Sea of Reality and be filled with the Love of God. Thank God we are in the Ark of the Covenant.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @development of capacity and readiness, @birth of Christ; purity; virginity of Mary, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
